title: Arduino Basics
description: Understand what a microcontroller is, set up the IDE, and write your first programs.

title: Reading Sensors
description: Wire and read ultrasonic, IR, and temperature sensors. Build a distance alarm.

title: Making Things Move
description: DC motors, L298N motor driver, PWM speed control, directional control.

title: Servo Motors
description: Servo control, the Arduino Servo library, and building a robotic arm segment.

title: Sensors + Movement Together
description: If-sensor-reads-X-do-Y logic. Obstacle detection, reactive navigation.

title: Navigation Algorithms
description: Wall following, bug algorithm, maze solving — both virtual and physical.

title: Your Robot, Your Rules
description: LEDs, buzzers, and custom behaviours that make your robot yours.

title: Final Project
description: Build an Autonomous Room Navigator. Video demo + code + write-up required.
